title: Mana Kirishima
wikitext:
[]: Mana Kirishima Post by BGMLV » Fri Jan 15, 2010 7:00 pm Hello there I am new here and I don't know where I could find a page to introduce myself but I could not find it. so sorry for this. (Me so Stupid ) anyhow for my topic for this forum is that what do you guys think about Mana?

[]: Post by Ironfoot » Fri Jan 15, 2010 7:10 pm Our welcome thread is in the Off-Topic Forum: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2[/url] As for Mana, I think she played her role pretty well (story wise). She's alright on a personable level, but more forgettable than the other characters.

[]: Post by ZapX » Fri Jan 15, 2010 7:19 pm I thought this thread said "Marisa Kirisame" and I got excited for a second. Marisa is awesome. Totally awesome. Mana's not awesome but not as bad as the A/S shippers make her out to be. Also, here's an older thread . You're new, so it's not a big deal but we encourage you to use the search and thread buttons up there at the top to see if something's been discussed before making a new thread.
